INTEL-F01.name: claim_ingest
INTEL-F01.description: Ingest a new claim into the truth layer via FEEDS.

INTEL-F02.name: claim_validate
INTEL-F02.description: Validate a claim against TTL, contradiction graph, and confidence thresholds.

INTEL-F03.name: claim_drift_detect
INTEL-F03.description: Detect drift from claim validation failures or confidence drops.

INTEL-F04.name: claim_patch_recommend
INTEL-F04.description: Generate a patch recommendation from a claim drift signal.

INTEL-F05.name: claim_mg_update
INTEL-F05.description: Update the Memory Graph with claim, drift, and patch nodes.

INTEL-F06.name: claim_canon_promote
INTEL-F06.description: Promote a validated claim to canon entry status.
postconditions: canon entry created with supersedes chain

INTEL-F07.name: claim_authority_check
INTEL-F07.description: Verify claim action is blessed by authority slice.

INTEL-F08.name: claim_evidence_verify
INTEL-F08.description: Verify claim evidence references exist in packet manifest.

INTEL-F09.name: claim_triage
INTEL-F09.description: Triage drift signals by severity and route to appropriate handler.

INTEL-F10.name: claim_supersede
INTEL-F10.description: Supersede a claim when a retcon or newer evidence arrives.

INTEL-F11.name: claim_half_life_check
INTEL-F11.description: Sweep claims for TTL expiry based on half-life configuration.

INTEL-F12.name: claim_confidence_recalc
INTEL-F12.description: Recalculate claim confidence based on evidence freshness and contradiction density.

FRAN-F01.name: canon_propose
FRAN-F01.description: Propose a new canon entry for blessing and activation.

FRAN-F02.name: canon_bless
FRAN-F02.description: Bless a proposed canon entry with authority verification.

FRAN-F03.name: canon_enforce
FRAN-F03.description: Enforce canon rules against active claims and decisions.

FRAN-F04.name: retcon_assess
FRAN-F04.description: Assess impact of a proposed retroactive correction.

FRAN-F05.name: retcon_execute
FRAN-F05.description: Execute a retcon: create superseding claim, update canon, seal record.

FRAN-F06.name: retcon_propagate
FRAN-F06.description: Propagate retcon effects to dependent claims and canon entries.

FRAN-F07.name: inflation_monitor
FRAN-F07.description: Monitor canon inflation: claim count, contradiction density, staleness, supersession depth.
postconditions: inflation drift emitted if thresholds breached

FRAN-F08.name: canon_expire
FRAN-F08.description: Expire canon entries past their expiresAt timestamp.
postconditions: expired entries transitioned to EXPIRED state

FRAN-F09.name: canon_supersede
FRAN-F09.description: Supersede a canon entry with a newer version.

FRAN-F10.name: canon_scope_check
FRAN-F10.description: Validate that a canon entry scope is consistent across domains.

FRAN-F11.name: canon_drift_detect
FRAN-F11.description: Detect canon-specific drift: stale entries, conflicting entries, orphaned claims.

FRAN-F12.name: canon_rollback
FRAN-F12.description: Rollback a canon entry to a prior version in the supersedes chain.

RE-F01.name: episode_begin
RE-F01.description: Begin a new decision episode, transitioning to PENDING then ACTIVE.

RE-F02.name: episode_seal
RE-F02.description: Seal an active episode with hash chain and provenance.

RE-F03.name: episode_archive
RE-F03.description: Archive a sealed episode to cold storage.

RE-F04.name: gate_evaluate
RE-F04.description: Evaluate all RuntimeGate constraints before execution.
postconditions: gate verdict recorded in audit log

RE-F05.name: gate_degrade
RE-F05.description: Walk the degrade ladder when a gate denies or degrades.

RE-F06.name: gate_killswitch
RE-F06.description: Activate the kill-switch: freeze all in-flight episodes and emit halt proof.

RE-F07.name: audit_non_coercion
RE-F07.description: Log non-coercion attestation: the agent was not forced to act.

RE-F08.name: severity_score
RE-F08.description: Compute centralized severity score for a drift signal or episode.
preconditions: drift signal has type and severity

RE-F09.name: coherence_check
RE-F09.description: Run coherence gate evaluation with domain context.
preconditions: coherence data available (DLR, RS, DS, MG)

RE-F10.name: reflection_ingest
RE-F10.description: Ingest a completed episode into the reflection session for learning.

RE-F11.name: iris_resolve
RE-F11.description: Resolve an IRIS query (WHY, WHAT_CHANGED, WHAT_DRIFTED, RECALL, STATUS).

RE-F12.name: episode_replay
RE-F12.description: Deterministically replay a sealed episode and verify hash match.

AUTH-F01.name: action_request_intake
AUTH-F01.description: Intake an action request for authority evaluation.

AUTH-F08.name: blast_radius_threshold
AUTH-F08.description: Compare blast radius against policy max.

AUTH-F13.name: authority_drift_scan
AUTH-F13.description: Master drift scan across all authority state.
postconditions: drift signals emitted for any detected anomalies

AUTH-F15.name: privilege_expiry_scan
AUTH-F15.description: Scan grants and delegations for expired or near-expiry privileges.

AUTH-F17.name: blast_radius_simulate
AUTH-F17.description: Simulate blast radius for an authority entity change.

AUTH-F19.name: dependency_map
AUTH-F19.description: Walk memory graph to map authority dependencies.

PDX-F01.name: tension_set_create
PDX-F01.description: Create a new Paradox Tension Set with poles.

PDX-F02.name: pole_manage
PDX-F02.description: Add, remove, or update poles on a PTS.

PDX-F03.name: dimension_attach
PDX-F03.description: Attach a dimension to a PTS.

PDX-F04.name: dimension_shift
PDX-F04.description: Record a dimension value change on a PTS.

PDX-F05.name: pressure_compute
PDX-F05.description: Compute pressure score and elevate if threshold met.

PDX-F06.name: imbalance_compute
PDX-F06.description: Compute imbalance vector for a PTS.

PDX-F07.name: threshold_evaluate
PDX-F07.description: Evaluate dimension thresholds on a PTS.

PDX-F08.name: drift_promote
PDX-F08.description: Promote elevated tension to drift signal.

PDX-F09.name: interdimensional_drift_detect
PDX-F09.description: Detect inter-dimensional drift in a PTS.

PDX-F10.name: seal_snapshot
PDX-F10.description: Seal current PTS state with hash and version.

PDX-F11.name: patch_issue
PDX-F11.description: Issue a tension patch with recommended actions.

INTEL-E01.name: claim_accepted
INTEL-E01.description: A new claim was ingested and accepted into the canon store.

INTEL-E02.name: claim_rejected
INTEL-E02.description: A claim was rejected during ingest (invalid schema, duplicate).

INTEL-E03.name: claim_validated
INTEL-E03.description: A claim passed all validation checks.

INTEL-E04.name: claim_contradiction_detected
INTEL-E04.description: A claim contradicts an existing canon claim.

INTEL-E05.name: claim_expired
INTEL-E05.description: A claim exceeded its half-life TTL.

INTEL-E06.name: claim_drift_recorded
INTEL-E06.description: A drift signal was recorded and fingerprinted for a claim.

INTEL-E07.name: patch_recommended
INTEL-E07.description: A patch recommendation was generated from a drift signal.

INTEL-E08.name: mg_updated
INTEL-E08.description: Memory Graph was updated with new claim/drift/patch nodes.

INTEL-E09.name: canon_promoted
INTEL-E09.description: A claim was promoted to canon entry status.

INTEL-E10.name: authority_verdict
INTEL-E10.description: Authority check completed for a claim action.

INTEL-E11.name: evidence_verdict
INTEL-E11.description: Evidence check completed for a claim action.

INTEL-E12.name: drift_triaged
INTEL-E12.description: A drift signal was triaged by severity.

INTEL-E13.name: claim_superseded
INTEL-E13.description: A claim was superseded by a newer version.

INTEL-E14.name: confidence_updated
INTEL-E14.description: A claim confidence score was recalculated.

FRAN-E01.name: canon_proposed
FRAN-E01.description: A new canon entry was proposed.

FRAN-E02.name: canon_blessed
FRAN-E02.description: A canon entry was blessed by authority.

FRAN-E05.name: retcon_executed
FRAN-E05.description: A retcon was executed and sealed.

FRAN-E06.name: retcon_drift
FRAN-E06.description: Drift signal emitted from retcon execution.

FRAN-E07.name: retcon_cascaded
FRAN-E07.description: Retcon effects propagated to dependent claims.

FRAN-E10.name: canon_superseded
FRAN-E10.description: A canon entry was superseded by a newer version.

FRAN-E13.name: canon_rolled_back
FRAN-E13.description: A canon entry was rolled back to a prior version.

RE-E01.name: episode_activated
RE-E01.description: A new decision episode was activated.

RE-E02.name: episode_sealed
RE-E02.description: A decision episode was sealed with hash chain.

RE-E03.name: episode_archived
RE-E03.description: A sealed episode was moved to cold storage.

RE-E05.name: degrade_applied
RE-E05.description: A degrade step was applied to an episode.

RE-E06.name: killswitch_activated
RE-E06.description: Kill-switch was activated, all episodes frozen.

RE-E07.name: non_coercion_attested
RE-E07.description: Non-coercion attestation recorded in audit log.

RE-E10.name: reflection_ingested
RE-E10.description: Sealed episode ingested into reflection session.

AUTH-E01.name: authority_evaluation_started
AUTH-E01.description: An authority evaluation was started for an action request.

AUTH-E02.name: actor_resolved
AUTH-E02.description: Actor identity and roles were resolved.

AUTH-E11.name: authority_audited
AUTH-E11.description: Authority audit record created and sealed.

AUTH-E15.name: privilege_orphaned
AUTH-E15.description: Grant depends on expired or revoked delegation.

AUTH-E16.name: policy_drift_detected
AUTH-E16.description: Policy hash does not match expected value.

AUTH-E18.name: authority_drift_signal
AUTH-E18.description: Composite authority drift signal from master scan.

AUTH-E20.name: authority_revocation_cascade
AUTH-E20.description: Revocation would cascade across multiple artifacts.

AUTH-E21.name: trust_surface_degraded
AUTH-E21.description: Trust surface has been weakened by authority changes.

AUTH-E22.name: authority_lockdown_recommended
AUTH-E22.description: Cross-domain trust break detected, lockdown recommended.

PDX-E01.name: pts_created
PDX-E01.description: A new Paradox Tension Set was created.

PDX-E02.name: pts_pole_added
PDX-E02.description: A pole was added, removed, or updated on a PTS.

PDX-E03.name: pts_dimension_attached
PDX-E03.description: A dimension was attached to a PTS.

PDX-E04.name: pts_dimension_shifted
PDX-E04.description: A dimension value changed on a PTS.

PDX-E05.name: pts_pressure_elevated
PDX-E05.description: Pressure score computed and PTS elevated.

PDX-E06.name: pts_imbalance_computed
PDX-E06.description: Imbalance vector computed for a PTS.

PDX-E07.name: pts_threshold_breached
PDX-E07.description: One or more dimension thresholds breached.

PDX-E08.name: pts_promoted_to_drift
PDX-E08.description: Elevated tension promoted to a drift signal.

PDX-E09.name: interdimensional_drift_detected
PDX-E09.description: Inter-dimensional drift detected: dimensions shifted unevenly.

PDX-E10.name: pts_sealed
PDX-E10.description: PTS state sealed with hash and version.

PDX-E11.name: pts_patch_issued
PDX-E11.description: A patch with recommended actions was issued for a PTS.
